query:
SELECT b.id as book_id, b.title, b.category, b.coverImageUrl, p.pageNumber, p.imageUrl, LEFT(CAST(p.panels AS CHAR), 500) as panels_preview
FROM books b
JOIN bookPages p ON p.bookId = b.id
WHERE b.id IN (60002, 60003, 60004)
ORDER BY b.id, p.pageNumber;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user YjcbNGfyMCcwqGq.root --database cuoraNs8SGWCiJUcwSXm4W --execute 
SELECT b.id as book_id, b.title, b.category, b.coverImageUrl, p.pageNumber, p.imageUrl, LEFT(CAST(p.panels AS CHAR), 500) as panels_preview
FROM books b
JOIN bookPages p ON p.bookId = b.id
WHERE b.id IN (60002, 60003, 60004)
ORDER BY b.id, p.pageNumber;
